message:
feat(freeze): Add define_method opcode Zig support

Convert define_method opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode defines a method on an object (for class methods).

Stack effect: [obj, func] -> [obj] (pops func, keeps obj)

Implementation:
- Pops func from stack
- Reads obj from stack (doesn't pop, keeps it)
- Creates atom from method name
- Defines property with configurable/writable flags
- Frees atom and func references
- Returns exception if operation fails
- Handles empty/invalid atoms by just freeing the popped func
- In Zig: uses block expressions for POP and qjs. prefix
- In C: uses POP() macro, next_block = -1 on error
